predicate_mappings.device_maintenance_case_open: the maintenance case for the device {} is open
predicate_mappings.device_assigned_staging_area: {} is assigned to the staging area {}
predicate_mappings.device_assigned_auxiliary: {} is assigned to the auxiliary device {}
predicate_mappings.device_linked_service_report: {} is linked to the service report {}
predicate_mappings.spare_component_available: {} is available as a spare component
predicate_mappings.service_report_available: {} is available as a service report
predicate_mappings.device_spare_component_compatible: {} is compatible with the spare component {}
predicate_mappings.device_service_report_compatible: {} is compatible with the service report {}
predicate_mappings.device_regulatory_document_linked: {} is linked to the regulatory document {}
predicate_mappings.device_regulatory_document_candidate: {} is a regulatory document candidate for {}

create_maintenance_case.description: create a maintenance case for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only create a maintenance case for a medical device asset A if it is not the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I create a maintenance case for a medical device asset A, it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open

allocate_maintenance_timeslot.description: allocate a maintenance timeslot B to a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only allocate a maintenance timeslot B to a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only allocate a maintenance timeslot B to a medical device asset A if it is not the case that A has a timeslot
effects: Once I allocate a maintenance timeslot B to a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is allocated to the timeslot B and A has a timeslot
Once I allocate a maintenance timeslot B to a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_allocated_timeslot.description: release a maintenance timeslot B from a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release a maintenance timeslot B from a medical device asset A if it is the case that A is allocated to the timeslot B
I can only release a maintenance timeslot B from a medical device asset A if it is not the case that the procedure for A has started and it is not the case that the verification for A is complete
effects: Once I release a maintenance timeslot B from a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a maintenance timeslot B from a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A is allocated to the timeslot B and it is not the case anymore that A has a timeslot and it is not the case anymore that A is ready at the station and it is not the case anymore that preparation of A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A is on regulatory hold and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for finalization and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional inspection

reserve_service_station.description: reserve a service station B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only reserve a service station B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a service station B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is reserved at B
Once I reserve a service station B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_service_station_reservation.description: release reservation of a service station B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a service station B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that A is reserved at B
effects: Once I release reservation of a service station B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release reservation of a service station B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved at B

perform_station_precheck.description: perform precheck at a service station B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only perform precheck at a service station B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and A has a timeslot and A is reserved at B
I can only perform precheck at a service station B for a medical device asset A if it is not the case that A is ready at the station
effects: Once I perform precheck at a service station B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is ready at the station

engage_external_contractor.description: engage an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only engage an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and A has a timeslot and B is available
I can only engage an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A if it is not the case that A is ready at the station
effects: Once I engage an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is ready at the station and A is on regulatory hold
Once I engage an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

perform_certified_stage_check.description: perform certified stage check on a medical device asset A at a service station B using a certification record C
preconditions: I can only perform certified stage check on a medical device asset A at a service station B using a certification record C if it is the case that A is ready at the station and A has a timeslot and A is reserved at B and C is present
I can only perform certified stage check on a medical device asset A at a service station B using a certification record C if it is not the case that preparation of A is complete
effects: Once I perform certified stage check on a medical device asset A at a service station B using a certification record C, it is the case that preparation of A is complete
Once I perform certified stage check on a medical device asset A at a service station B using a certification record C, it is not the case anymore that A is on regulatory hold

apply_regulatory_document_verification.description: apply regulatory document verification to a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B
preconditions: I can only apply regulatory document verification to a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B if it is the case that A has a timeslot and B is bound to A
I can only apply regulatory document verification to a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B if it is not the case that preparation of A is complete
effects: Once I apply regulatory document verification to a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B, it is the case that preparation of A is complete
Once I apply regulatory document verification to a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B, it is not the case anymore that A is on regulatory hold

reserve_consumable_kit.description: reserve a consumable kit B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only reserve a consumable kit B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a consumable kit B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A has a reserved kit B
Once I reserve a consumable kit B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_consumable_kit.description: release a consumable kit B from a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release a consumable kit B from a medical device asset A if it is the case that A has a reserved kit B
effects: Once I release a consumable kit B from a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a consumable kit B from a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reserved kit B

reserve_staging_area.description: reserve a staging area B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only reserve a staging area B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a staging area B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is assigned to the staging area B
Once I reserve a staging area B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_staging_area.description: release a staging area B from a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release a staging area B from a medical device asset A if it is the case that A is assigned to the staging area B
effects: Once I release a staging area B from a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a staging area B from a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the staging area B

reserve_auxiliary_device.description: reserve an auxiliary device B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only reserve an auxiliary device B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve an auxiliary device B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is assigned to the auxiliary device B
Once I reserve an auxiliary device B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_auxiliary_device.description: release an auxiliary device B from a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release an auxiliary device B from a medical device asset A if it is the case that A is assigned to the auxiliary device B
effects: Once I release an auxiliary device B from a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an auxiliary device B from a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the auxiliary device B

reserve_service_report.description: reserve a service report B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only reserve a service report B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and B is available as a service report and A is compatible with the service report B
effects: Once I reserve a service report B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is linked to the service report B
Once I reserve a service report B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a service report

release_service_report.description: release a service report B from a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only release a service report B from a medical device asset A if it is the case that A is linked to the service report B
effects: Once I release a service report B from a medical device asset A, it is the case that B is available as a service report
Once I release a service report B from a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the service report B

initiate_procedure_execution.description: initiate execution of a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A using a consumable kit C at a staging area D
preconditions: I can only initiate execution of a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A using a consumable kit C at a staging area D if it is the case that A has a timeslot and A has a reserved kit C and A is assigned to the staging area D and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only initiate execution of a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A using a consumable kit C at a staging area D if it is not the case that the procedure for A has started
effects: Once I initiate execution of a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A using a consumable kit C at a staging area D, it is the case that A is selected for the procedure B and the procedure for A has started
Once I initiate execution of a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A using a consumable kit C at a staging area D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

initiate_procedure_with_auxiliary_and_sp.description: initiate procedure a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device C and a spare component record D
preconditions: I can only initiate procedure a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device C and a spare component record D if it is the case that A has a timeslot and A is assigned to the auxiliary device C and D is available as a spare component and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with the spare component D

I can only initiate procedure a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device C and a spare component record D if it is not the case that the procedure for A has started
effects: Once I initiate procedure a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device C and a spare component record D, it is the case that A is selected for the procedure B and the procedure for A has started and A requires additional inspection and A is on regulatory hold

Once I initiate procedure a maintenance procedure B on a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device C and a spare component record D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available as a spare component

complete_procedure_validation.description: complete procedure validation for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C
preconditions: I can only complete procedure validation for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C if it is the case that the procedure for A has started and A requires additional inspection and A has a reserved kit B and A is assigned to the staging area C
effects: Once I complete procedure validation for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional inspection and it is not the case anymore that A is on regulatory hold

perform_compliance_verification.description: perform compliance verification for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C with a device class D
preconditions: I can only perform compliance verification for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C with a device class D if it is the case that preparation of A is complete and the procedure for A has started and A has a reserved kit B and A is assigned to the staging area C and A has the attribute D

I can only perform compliance verification for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C with a device class D if it is not the case that A is on regulatory hold and it is not the case that the verification for A is complete
effects: Once I perform compliance verification for a medical device asset A using a consumable kit B in a staging area C with a device class D, it is the case that the verification for A is complete

bind_regulatory_and_service_documentatio.description: bind regulatory and service documentation for a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device B, a service report C, and a vendor configuration D
preconditions: I can only bind regulatory and service documentation for a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device B, a service report C, and a vendor configuration D if it is the case that preparation of A is complete and the procedure for A has started and A is assigned to the auxiliary device B and A is linked to the service report C and A has the attribute D

I can only bind regulatory and service documentation for a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device B, a service report C, and a vendor configuration D if it is not the case that the verification for A is complete
effects: Once I bind regulatory and service documentation for a medical device asset A with an auxiliary device B, a service report C, and a vendor configuration D, it is the case that the verification for A is complete and A is on regulatory hold

mark_ready_for_finalization.description: mark a medical device asset A as ready for finalization with a consumable kit B in a staging area C
preconditions: I can only mark a medical device asset A as ready for finalization with a consumable kit B in a staging area C if it is the case that the verification for A is complete and A is on regulatory hold and A has a reserved kit B and A is assigned to the staging area C
effects: Once I mark a medical device asset A as ready for finalization with a consumable kit B in a staging area C, it is the case that A is ready for finalization

Once I mark a medical device asset A as ready for finalization with a consumable kit B in a staging area C, it is not the case anymore that A is on regulatory hold and it is not the case anymore that preparation of A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional inspection

perform_certified_stage_execution.description: perform certified stage execution on a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C
preconditions: I can only perform certified stage execution on a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C if it is the case that A is ready for finalization and the verification for A is complete and A has a timeslot and A is reserved at B and C is present
I can only perform certified stage execution on a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C if it is not the case that preparation of A is complete
effects: Once I perform certified stage execution on a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C, it is the case that preparation of A is complete

authorize_service_for_station.description: authorize service for a medical device asset A at a service station B
preconditions: I can only authorize service for a medical device asset A at a service station B if it is the case that the verification for A is complete and preparation of A is complete and A is reserved at B
I can only authorize service for a medical device asset A at a service station B if it is not the case that A is on regulatory hold and it is not the case that the service for A is authorized
effects: Once I authorize service for a medical device asset A at a service station B, it is the case that the service for A is authorized

consume_external_contractor_token.description: consume an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only consume an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A if it is the case that the verification for A is complete and preparation of A is complete and B is available
I can only consume an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A if it is not the case that A is on regulatory hold and it is not the case that the service for A is authorized
effects: Once I consume an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A, it is the case that the service for A is authorized
Once I consume an external contractor token B for a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

attach_regulatory_document_to_device.description: attach a regulatory document B to a medical device asset A
preconditions: I can only attach a regulatory document B to a medical device asset A if it is the case that the service for A is authorized and B is available and B is a regulatory document candidate for A
effects: Once I attach a regulatory document B to a medical device asset A, it is the case that A is linked to the regulatory document B
Once I attach a regulatory document B to a medical device asset A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_regulatory_document_to_fixed_device.description: bind a regulatory document C to a fixed device A using a portable device B
preconditions: I can only bind a regulatory document C to a fixed device A using a portable device B if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and A requires a fixed device checklist and C is applicable to A and B is linked to the regulatory document C
I can only bind a regulatory document C to a fixed device A using a portable device B if it is not the case that C is bound to A
effects: Once I bind a regulatory document C to a fixed device A using a portable device B, it is the case that C is bound to A

record_post_staging_inspection.description: record post staging inspection for a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C
preconditions: I can only record post staging inspection for a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C if it is the case that the maintenance case for the device A is open and A requires a fixed device checklist and preparation of A is complete and the service for A is authorized and A is reserved at B and C is present
I can only record post staging inspection for a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C if it is not the case that A requires post execution inspection
effects: Once I record post staging inspection for a medical device asset A at a service station B with a certification record C, it is the case that A requires post execution inspection

close_case_portable_checklist.description: close case for a medical device asset A with portable device checklist
preconditions: I can only close case for a medical device asset A with portable device checklist if it is the case that A requires a portable device checklist and the maintenance case for the device A is open and A has a timeslot and the procedure for A has started and the verification for A is complete and the service for A is authorized and preparation of A is complete
I can only close case for a medical device asset A with portable device checklist if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a medical device asset A with portable device checklist, it is the case that the case for A is closed

close_case_with_regulatory_document.description: close case for a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B
preconditions: I can only close case for a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B if it is the case that A requires a fixed device checklist and the maintenance case for the device A is open and A has a timeslot and the procedure for A has started and the verification for A is complete and the service for A is authorized and preparation of A is complete and B is bound to A
I can only close case for a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a medical device asset A using a regulatory document B, it is the case that the case for A is closed

close_case_with_post_execution_inspectio.description: close case for a medical device asset A with post execution inspection
preconditions: I can only close case for a medical device asset A with post execution inspection if it is the case that A requires a fixed device checklist and the maintenance case for the device A is open and A has a timeslot and the procedure for A has started and the verification for A is complete and the service for A is authorized and preparation of A is complete and A requires post execution inspection
I can only close case for a medical device asset A with post execution inspection if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a medical device asset A with post execution inspection, it is the case that the case for A is closed

action_nl_templates.create_maintenance_case: create a maintenance case for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.allocate_maintenance_timeslot: allocate maintenance timeslot {?maintenance_timeslot} to medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_allocated_timeslot: release maintenance timeslot {?maintenance_timeslot} from medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.reserve_service_station: reserve service station {?service_station} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_service_station_reservation: release reservation of service station {?service_station} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.perform_station_precheck: perform precheck at service station {?service_station} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.engage_external_contractor: engage external contractor token {?external_contractor_token} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.perform_certified_stage_check: perform certified stage check on medical device asset {?medical_device_asset} at service station {?service_station} using certification record {?certification_record}
action_nl_templates.apply_regulatory_document_verification: apply regulatory document verification to medical device asset {?medical_device_asset} using regulatory document {?regulatory_document}
action_nl_templates.reserve_consumable_kit: reserve consumable kit {?consumable_kit} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_consumable_kit: release consumable kit {?consumable_kit} from medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.reserve_staging_area: reserve staging area {?staging_area} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_staging_area: release staging area {?staging_area} from medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.reserve_auxiliary_device: reserve auxiliary device {?auxiliary_device} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_auxiliary_device: release auxiliary device {?auxiliary_device} from medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.reserve_service_report: reserve service report {?service_report} for medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.release_service_report: release service report {?service_report} from medical device asset {?medical_device_asset}
action_nl_templates.initiate_procedure_execution: initiate execution of maintenance procedure {?maintenance_procedure} on medical device asset {?medical_device_asset} using consumable kit {?consumable_kit} at staging area {?staging_area}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a physical object is also a object

Everything that is a medical device asset or a maintenance timeslot or a maintenance procedure or a staging area or a consumable kit or a auxiliary device or a service station or a external contractor token or a regulatory document or a certification record or a spare component record or a service report or a asset attribute is also a physical object
Everything that is a device class or a vendor configuration is also a asset attribute
Everything that is a portable device or a fixed device is also a medical device asset
